name: Do FAQ pages help with AI SEO, or are they outdated?
description: Real FAQ pages still help when they answer actual questions clearly. Thin, keyword-stuffed FAQs do not work well, but useful Q&A content is AI-friendly.

mainEntity.name: Do FAQ pages help with AI SEO, or are they outdated?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, but they usually need to be rewritten for clarity, usefulness, and accuracy. A thin FAQ that only repeats keywords will not help much, while a real FAQ that answers actual customer concerns can improve both usability and AI retrieval.
acceptedAnswer.description: Real FAQ pages still help when they answer actual questions clearly. Thin, keyword-stuffed FAQs do not work well, but useful Q&A content is AI-friendly.
